scaling_summary.classical_complexity: Brute-force O(2^n); GW SDP O(n³) with 0.878-approx
scaling_summary.quantum_complexity: QAOA depth O(n²) per layer, approximation ratio depends on depth p
scaling_summary.theoretical_speedup: None proven for constant-depth QAOA on MaxCut
scaling_summary.crossover_estimate: Uncertain — no proven quantum advantage for MaxCut QAOA at any depth
scaling_summary.honest_assessment: QAOA is a heuristic. GW achieves 0.878-approximation in polynomial time. No constant-depth QAOA is known to surpass this. Advantage would require super-polynomial circuit depth, which eliminates the speed benefit.

recommendation: Stage D evidence package is complete. All claims are bounded by explicit residual risks and honest assessments. No demonstration of practical quantum advantage is claimed.
